document_summary: Faculty profile of Dr. Liping Sun from the School of Social Science at Tsinghua University. Sun is a Professor and PhD supervisor in the Department of Sociology, who also served as a judge at the 13th Tiger Roar Awards alongside Liu. This document establishes the caliber of fellow judges and Sun's credentials as a recommender.

snippets.text: Professor at the Department of Sociology, Tsinghua University, and PhD supervisor
snippets.subject: Liping Sun
snippets.reasoning: Establishes Sun's credentials as a Tsinghua University professor and PhD supervisor, lending credibility to the judging panel Liu served on.

snippets.text: Professor Liping Sun mainly engages in research on social modernization, changes in social structure, oral social history, and sociology of transition societies. In more than 20 years of teaching and research, Professor Sun has published more than 10 monographs (including co- authored works) and dozens of papers. His major works include "Social Modernization,"
snippets.subject: Liping Sun
snippets.reasoning: Demonstrates Sun's prolific academic record (10+ monographs, dozens of papers, 20+ years of research), establishing the caliber of peer judges.

snippets.text: After entering the 21st century, Professor Sun continuously published the "Social Fracture Trilogy" ("Fracture," "Imbalance," "Game"), which proposed the characteristics of the transition process in China's social structure and received widespread attention from the academic community and the public.
snippets.subject: Liping Sun
snippets.reasoning: Sun's widely acclaimed Social Fracture Trilogy received widespread attention from academia and the public, showing the distinguished background of Tiger Roar Awards judges.

snippets.text: Before joining Tsinghua University in 2000, from 1982 to 2000, Professor LipingSun was at the Department of Sociology, Peking University, successively serving as an assistant, lecturer, and associate professor.
snippets.subject: Liping Sun
snippets.reasoning: Previous appointment at Peking University (1982-2000) before Tsinghua University further establishes Sun's distinguished academic career at China's top two universities.
